name: Same Management Policy Added and Deleted within a Short Period of Time (Office 365)
notes: This rule triggers when same management policy is added and deleted within a short period of time.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Management Role Assignment Removed (Office 365) match at least 1 times with the same Policy Name (custom) in 30 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Management Role Assignment Added (Office 365) match
conditions_text: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Policy Name (custom) and different Low Level Category in 30 minutes

when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Management Role Assignment Removed (Office 365) match at least 1 times with the same Policy Name (custom) in 30 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Management Role Assignment Added (Office 365) match
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Policy Name (custom) and different Low Level Category in 30 minutes

when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Management Role Assignment Removed (Office 365) match at least 1 times with the same Policy Name (custom) in 30 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Management Role Assignment Added (Office 365) match
TD_list: APPLY Same Management Policy Added and Deleted within a Short Period of Time (Office 365) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Policy Name (custom) and different Low Level Category in 30 minutes

AND when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Management Role Assignment Removed (Office 365) match at least 1 times with the same Policy Name (custom) in 30 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Management Role Assignment Added (Office 365) match
RED_list: Event name: Same Management Policy Added and Deleted within a Short Period of Time
Event description: Detects when same management policy is added and deleted within a short period of time.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Policy Name (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
